issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Build an orders refund admin tool with chained button actions
scenarios.rationale: Treatment shows a PostgreSQL query using {{components.statusFilter.value}} bindings, a JavaScript transformation, and a chained onClick that runs queries.processRefund.run(), shows an alert via actions.showAlert, and refreshes data; baseline gives generic CRUD app advice without ToolJet-specific bindings.

scenarios.name: Self-host ToolJet with environments and app version control
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented docker compose up -d (or the helm chart from tooljet/helm-charts), mentions ToolJet environments for dev/staging/prod, and recommends exporting apps as JSON for Git versioning; baseline gives generic Docker self-host steps without environments or JSON export.
